Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories Special Interrogatories And Demand For Inspection And For Monetary Sanctions Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Declaration Of Sean P Barry In Support Of Proposed Order
Off Calendar Nov-09-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Philip T. Kilduff of the law offices of Leach McGreevy & Labrador LLP (415.775.4455) makes special appearance on behalf of counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Robert Anderson of the law offices of Carbone Smoke Smith Bent & Leonard (510.267.7277) appears telephonically as counsel for defendant/moving party

Both sides stipulate to judge pro tem. Counsel for plaintiff submits on tentative ruling except as to sanctions. Counsel for defendant/moving party waives sanctions and asks for compliance date. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT AARON LEVINE'S Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories Special Interrogatories And Demand For Inspection And For Monetary Sanctions Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Declaration Of Sean P Barry In Support Of Proposed Order is granted. No opposition filed. Discovery responses must be produced no later than November 16, 2016. The Court will issue a written order.

Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302/jpt)
